concerns.text: FR-013 requires calculating the standard deviation of prediction errors per system to evaluate data density. The plan mentions 'Error Code Logging' and 'LOW_DATA_DENSITY' checks but does not explicitly describe a step or module responsible for calculating the per-system standard deviation of errors as a distinct task. This metric is required to trigger the FR-008 error condition, yet the plan's 'Methodology' section only lists 'Metrics & baseline comparison' generally.

SC-009 requires measuring the standard deviation of prediction errors against a 50K threshold. The plan's 'Evaluation Metrics' section (3.3) lists MAE, R², and baseline comparison, but does not explicitly state that the standard deviation of errors per system will be calculated and reported to satisfy this success criterion.
